textByHash.006c2aab42fe399355484baf2eabd7989a118692: But some day he send new commander!
textByHash.068714bb6235123b4ef0fcec1c74f709f647c6e9: Not to doubt Big High War God!
textByHash.85be1e74e11878e1d0cd0b5dd6bc9ee04265c34d: This is what Big High War God say:
textByHash.8da52b6c85a6d5d49a1a4cb8463e83ff72abfc62: Slay enemies of Big High War God!
textByHash.a0240c9b75e9c92fd176466ca78fc399c5b7436d: New commander leads goblins to victory!
textByHash.a9b4ec6d63b05915c79d1de686087bf4abffa6bd: Then Big High War God return!
textByHash.c14973e78360d5bc5315b03d9ae21725a267b6f9: Big High War God send commander!
textByHash.ced429829d1f7efc707b3d955674de5080566102: In beginning, goblins have no commander.
textByHash.de1887d55be2ffb8b01ac22d2ee110970aa45c98: Big High War God make us strong!
textByHash.dec24cf18b717ea80934082884a1106e1f40d466: He send commander to lead us.
